description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a long, narrow blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade appears to be solid and uniform in color, likely constructed from a single material. A simple, rectangular crossguard separates the blade from the handle, providing basic hand protection. The handle is cylindrical with subtle texturing or ridges for grip, and it ends in a slightly flared pommel. The entire object is a dark, matte color, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on any part of the object.
description: A straight, dark-colored sword with a simple crossguard and a textured cylindrical handle. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the straight blade and handle alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured, dark-colored, slightly flared pommel
